referenceSummary: A premium classic roofing website template emphasizing durability and modern style through a warm, earthy palette and structured layout.
visualThesis: Blending timeless craftsmanship with bold modern design to convey strength, clarity, and trustworthiness.

palette.name: primary
palette.usage: Dark green background blocks for branding, trust, and textual contrast.

palette.name: secondary
palette.usage: Accent and call-to-action buttons to draw user attention.

palette.name: neutral-light
palette.usage: Background for sections to create warmth and improve readability.

palette.name: text-dark
palette.usage: Primary text color for high reading contrast.

typography.display: Serif, Bold, Uppercase or Title Case for headings to evoke premium and classic tone
typography.body: Sans-serif, Regular weight for readability in paragraphs
typography.label: Sans-serif, Medium weight, uppercase or small caps for service icons and badges
typography.notes: Clean, modern type pairing emphasizing clear hierarchy with no excessive ornamentation

imageDirection.hero: High-quality architectural photos of modern roofed homes with warm sunlight
imageDirection.services: Minimalist line icons paired with subtle photo overlays representing roof tasks
imageDirection.projects: Photographic case studies showing diverse roofing styles in real environments
mustAvoid: Overly staged or generic stock images with too much unrelated props
Images with excessive filters or low contrast
Photos featuring people facing camera or unrelated lifestyle shots

layoutRhythm.pattern: Full width split hero with left aligned text and right aligned image; warm background gradient
Wide container with centered text block on dark background
layoutRhythm.notes: Includes founder signature and photo in small circle

layoutRhythm.pattern: Grid of evenly spaced icon + text cards with subtle borders and light background
Two column masonry with bullet list on left and embedded images on right with elevations
Horizontal scroller or card clusters with badges and star ratings
Horizontal carousel of cards with small text overlays and images
Full width dark block with multi-column links and subscription input

componentTokens.radius: 6px for cards and buttons for subtle rounding
componentTokens.border: 1px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.1) for service cards and testimonial containers
componentTokens.shadow: Soft drop shadows with 0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.12) for floating effect
componentTokens.button: Filled background primary color with white text, medium padding, hover lighten effect

ctaHierarchy: Primary: 'Get Your Free Roof Audit' button in orange in hero
Secondary: Contact Us button in dark green top right
Tertiary: Newsletter subscription form at footer
fidelityRisks: Maintaining consistent quality and resolution of architectural images
Balancing warm background tones while preserving text legibility
Retaining clean iconography with minimal detail to match classic style
openDesignRules: Use serif fonts for headings and sans-serif for body text for hierarchy clarity
Limit palette to 4-5 core colors to maintain brand coherence
Ensure enough padding inside cards and text sections for readability
Maintain center alignment for testimonial content and quotes
Use star rating component consistently with 5 stars max
publicApprovalChecklist: Confirm the brand colors meet accessibility contrast requirements
Validate that all images depict roof-related scenes without licensing issues
Verify all CTA text aligns with the roofing niche and is actionable
Collect user feedback on readability of text blocks with background variations
Ensure responsive behavior for hero split layout and service grid
